RenewVpn.vpnId: The ID of the VPN gateway to renew
RenewVpn.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of no more than 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](https://cloud.baidu.com/doc/VPC/s/gjwvyu77i/).
RenewVpn.billing.paymentTiming: Payment timing: Prepaid or Postpaid. Required when creating an order; not required for renewal orders.
RenewVpn.billing.reservation: Reservation details. Not required for Postpaid; required for Prepaid.
